use_cases: Triggering delete actions with visual feedback for destructive operations
Handling form submissions with various visual states
Interactive buttons with hover and focus states
Customizable button styling through variant props
ai_summary: A versatile button component featuring multiple style variants including destructive, outline, secondary, ghost, and link styles. Built with CVA for type-safe variant management and Radix UI's Slot for polymorphic behavior. Supports disabled states and keyboard focus accessibility.
